title: Retail Sales Assistant
description:
Retail Sales Assistant - Join Asia's Leading Precious Metals & Bullion Dealer!

Why Join LPM Singapore?

We are a leader in the precious metals industry with the largest dealer network in the Asia Pacific region. We are a full-service precious metals trading company offering a wide array of internationally recognized bullion, proof commemorative coins and custom-minted items. We have experienced consistent year-on-year growth and have recently expanded with the opening of LPM Singapore.

We are a fast-growing company looking for a highly energetic, enthusiastic and fantastic local talent to join our expansion in Singapore. We offer fast-track career development opportunities and competitive remuneration to the right candidate.

Key Responsibilities:

  • Attend to incoming telephone and email enquiries promptly and professionally
  • Assist walk-in customers with over-the-counter retail sales
  • Provide courteous and knowledgeable service to all customers entering the shop
  • Prepare and hand over customer pick-up orders accurately
  • Conduct KYC checks in line with internal policies and regulatory requirements
  • Ensure the shop is clean, organised, and visually presentable at all times
  • Set up the retail space prior to opening hours to support smooth daily operations
  • Support additional sales and operational duties as assigned by management

Experience & Qualifications:

  • Minimum 1 year of experience in a customer-facing retail or service role
  • Prior experience or interest in precious metals or financial products is an advantage
  • Strong customer service skills and a professional appearance
  • Basic proficiency in Microsoft Excel and Microsoft Office
  • A team-oriented mindset with a positive attitude and willingness to learn
  • Good written and verbal communication skills in English
  • Ability to multitask and work efficiently in a fast-paced retail environment

Benefits of the Role:

  • Annual Wage Supplement equivalent to one month’s salary
  • Up to 14 days of annual leave
  • Staff discount programme
  • Fixed working hours from Monday to Friday (no weekend work required)
  • Strong career progression opportunities within a newly established business backed by a publicly listed NYSE company

Apply Today!

If you are motivated, customer-focused, and eager to grow with a leading precious metals business, we welcome your application. Please submit your full resume along with your expected salary.

postedCompany.description: LPM Singapore is Asia's leading precious metals and bullion dealer. We offer a wide range of gold, silver and platinum products for investment as well as exclusive collectibles from top global mints. In addition, we offer our valued customers secure storage services to store their precious metals. We also buy back precious metals from our customers at highly competitive rates.
postedCompany.name: AM LPM SINGAPORE PTE. LTD.
